name: quimera-ai
description: Claude Code plugins by bgmacris. Currently: tandem — a real-time shared Chrome (human + Claude, CDP + Playwright MCP) with per-site navigation memory.

plugins.name: tandem
plugins.description: A shared Chrome browser (human + Claude, CDP + Playwright MCP) that LEARNS how each site is navigated: per-site navigation memory (tandem:map) with durable locators, drift detection, and automatic profile injection on navigation.
